channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Sam Hauser becomes 4th Celtics player with 9 3s in a game as Boston keeps shooting from deep
item.description: Sam Hauser started in place of Jayson Tatum and did what he and the Boston Celtics have done all season — shoot a bunch of 3-pointers and make more than their share.
item.dc:creator: Brendan Mcgair, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Luka, Lakers frustrated with officiating and themselves in a rough first game without LeBron James
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — LeBron James sat on the end of the Lakers' bench, wearing a red baseball cap while watching his team in the first game since his groin injury. The red on the court Monday night was in Luka Doncic's face, frustrated by his rocky play and angry with the officiating.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Ex-Yankees pitcher Schallock, who once replaced Mickey Mantle on roster, dies at 100
item.description: The Bay Area native went to Tamalpais High in Mill Valley then College of Marin before becoming the 10,823rd major league player when he debuted on July 16, 1951.
item.dc:creator: Janie McCauley, The Mercury News

item.title: Jets and QB Justin Fields agree to a 2-year, $40 million deal, AP source says
item.description: Justin Fields was passed over by the New York Jets four years ago in the NFL draft. Now he's expected to be their No. 1 quarterback. Fields and the Jets agreed Monday to a two-year contract worth $40 million, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: The 49ers lose several key players on the opening day of free agency
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — The opening of free agency for the San Francisco 49ers was more about their losses than their additions.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Paige Bueckers scores 24 points and UConn wins 23rd Big East crown with 70-50 victory over Creighton
item.description: UNCASVILLE, Conn. (AP) — Paige Bueckers scored 24 points and Azzi Fudd added 13 to help No. 3 UConn beat 22nd-ranked Creighton 70-50 to win the Big East championship Monday night.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Olivia Culpo and Christian McCaffrey announce pregnancy with walk in a field
item.description: It doesn't look like Culpo and McCaffrey wasted much time starting a family after they wed in a lavish ceremony in June 2024 in Rhode Island.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: Saunders earns first team All-Big 12 honors
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Fresh off leading No. 17 BYU to its eighth straight win on Saturday, Richie Saunders was named the Big 12 Most Improved Player and claimed First Team All-Big honors. Egor Demin earned honorable mention all-conference and all-freshman accolades.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Josh Sweat reaches agreement with Cardinals on 4-year deal after winning Super Bowl with Eagles: reports
item.description: Josh Sweat has a Super Bowl ring and now a new team after he reportedly agreed to a deal with the Arizona Cardinals to leave the Philadelphia Eagles in NFL free agency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: QB Sam Darnold agrees on a 3-year, $100.5 million deal with Seahawks, AP source says
item.description: Quarterback Sam Darnold has agreed on a three-year, $100.5 million contract with the Seattle Seahawks, a person with knowledge of the deal told The Associated Press on Monday.
item.dc:creator: Rob Maaddi And Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Super-sectional Monday: A look at Chicagoland prep boys basketball teams playing for trip to IHSA State Tournament
item.description: One of the best days of the Illinois high school sports calendar has arrived. It's super-sectional Monday for boys basketball.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Medics who treated soccer legend Maradona before his death go on trial for homicide
item.description: BUENOS AIRES, Argentina (AP) — Seven members of the medical team that treated Argentine soccer great Diego Maradona before his death will go on trial for homicide starting Tuesday in Buenos Aires.
item.dc:creator: DÉBORA REY and SERGIO FARELLA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bills reward Allen with new contract after NFL MVP season. Deal is worth $330M, AP source says
item.description: ORCHARD PARK, N.Y. (AP) — NFL MVP Josh Allen was rewarded Sunday with a contract extension worth $330 million, including an NFL record $250 million of it guaranteed, which makes him among the league’s highest-paid players.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Women's runner hospitalized after falling unconscious during distance race at European Championships
item.description: Women's athlete Maureen Koster was knocked unconscious when she fell down at the European Indoor Championships on Sunday, and was later taken to a hospital.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Verstappen bids for 5th title and Hamilton's at Ferrari as F1 prepares for a close fight in 2025
item.description: Lando Norris will have to defy plenty of history to win the Formula 1 title this year. There's his friend-turned-rival Max Verstappen's bid for a fifth title in a row.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: George, Filipowski score 25 in Jazz loss to Sixers
item.description: PHILADELPHIA (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George and Kyle Filipowski each scored 25 points, but the Utah Jazz dropped its fifth straight game, losing at Philadelphia Sunday night, 126-122. Lonnie Walker IV and Quentin Grimes scored 25 points apiece for the victories 76ers.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bills' Josh Allen agrees to 6-year extension with record-setting guarantee: reports
item.description: Josh Allen, fresh off an MVP campaign, just got paid as the Buffalo Bills announced a six-year extension, which reportedly is worth $330 million with $250 million guaranteed.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Utes win another NCAA skiing national title
item.description: HANOVER, N.H. (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah returned to the pinnacle of the collegiate skiing world on Saturday as the Utes won their 17th national title all-time—and fifth in the last six seasons—with the conclusion of the 2025 NCAA Championships.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah's comeback falls short in 4-3 overtime loss
item.description: CHICAGO (ABC4 Sports) - Connor Bedard scored at 3:10 of overtime to give the Chicago Blackhawks a 4-3 victory against the Utah Hockey Club at United Center on Friday. Bedard circled the net and scored from the slot after going eight games without a goal.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes hire Alex Jensen as head basketball coach
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Alex Jensen is coming home to Utah. Jensen was hired as the University of Utah's 17th head basketball coach Thursdaay, replacing Craig Smith, who was fired last month.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boys Basketball: Carlsbad 59, Fairmont Prep 55
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- 2025 CIF State Boys Basketball Championships Division I Carlsbad defeated Fairmont Prep 59-55. The visitors made the trek from Anaheim, and they could not slow down UCSD commit Jake Hall who hit for a game high 32 points for the Lancers.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Chris Collins shares special basketball bond with son Ryan at Northwestern
item.description: EVANSTON, Ill. - Two hours before tipoff Monday at Welsh-Ryan Arena, Ryan Collins had the ball in his hands, showing off his shot, a similar scene to another coach’s son some four decades earlier. “He shows off before the game, just like I used to do,” said Northwestern head coach Chris Collins.
item.dc:creator: Josh Frydman, WGN 9

item.title: Baseball: Santa Fe Christian 3. Valhalla 2
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Baseball first game of the season for Santa Fe Christian who won a low scoring game against Valhalla 3-2. Eagles were paced by sophomore Kyle Plasman, young man was on a good one out the gate, 3 for 4 with three doubles. A fantastic pitching performance by senior Kam Lohse.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Jimmy Johnson retires from Fox Sports after being face of NFL coverage for most of 3 decades
item.description: Jimmy Johnson, the Pro Football Hall of Fame coach who won two Super Bowls and a college national championship, announced his retirement from Fox Sports on Monday after being part of its NFL coverage for most of the network's 31 years.
item.dc:creator: Eric Olson, WFLA, NBC
